articles.title: Colin Cowherd: Celtics future feels ‘weird’ compared to sustainable Knicks
articles.description:
"Tatum and Brown's contracts limit the Celtics' cheap, youthful, limited front line. That's not good long term."

summary: Colin Cowherd critiques Celtics' future compared to Knicks on June 5, 2026.
Tatum and Brown's contracts limit Celtics' roster flexibility and youth.
Boston residents may face challenges in team sustainability and competitiveness.

articles.title: Red Sox move Garrett Crochet to 60-day IL as ace continues to deal with discomfort
articles.description:
